questions.question: What is the capital of Italy?
questions.correct_feedback: Exactly! Rome is the capital of Italy.

questions.question: How many planets does the solar system have?
questions.incorrect_feedback: Incorrect! There are 8 planets in the solar system.

questions.question: Who painted the Mona Lisa?
questions.correct_feedback: Well done! It is the work of Leonardo da Vinci.
questions.incorrect_feedback: Wrong! The author is Leonardo da Vinci.

questions.question: In what year did World War II end?
What is the chemical symbol for Oxygen?
questions.correct_feedback: Right! The symbol for Oxygen is O.
questions.incorrect_feedback: Wrong! The symbol for Oxygen is O.

questions.question: What is the square root of 144?
questions.correct_feedback: Perfect! The square root of 144 is 12.

questions.question: Which ocean is the largest in the world?
questions.correct_feedback: Correct! The Pacific is the largest.
questions.incorrect_feedback: Wrong! The largest is the Pacific.

questions.question: Who wrote the Divine Comedy?
questions.incorrect_feedback: Wrong! The author is Dante Alighieri.
